synthesis.summary: COHR surged 13.58% with no company-specific news in the supplied set to explain the move. The only available news is a broad macro/market recap about S&P 500 and copper prices, which has no direct bearing on Coherent's business. The move is likely driven by unobservable factors such as options flow, institutional buying, or sector rotation into photonics/optical components names.
